avoid_when: The model is underfitting or the input images are already heavily distorted.

evidence.note: Torchvision exposes RandAugment as a standard image-classification transform.

risk: Excessive magnitude can erase subtle breed cues.
summary: Apply a reproducible moderate RandAugment policy to reduce overfitting on scarce breed examples.
use_when: There are few labeled images per class and validation loss overfits.
